title: hydrangea opuloides var. acuminata
intro: Hydrangea opuloides var. acuminata, also known as the Chinese hydrangea, is a variety of flowering plant native to China, belonging to the family Hydrangeaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Hydrangea opuloides var. acuminata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
